suggestions.title: Tighten wordy opener
suggestions.description: The phrase 'In order to' adds words without meaning. Replace with 'To'.
suggestions.original: In order to improve the user experience

suggestions.title: Prefer active voice
suggestions.description: Active voice is more direct and easier to follow.
suggestions.original: the report was written by the team

socratic_questions: What single change would most strengthen the opening line for your audience?

issues: One sentence exceeds 28 words; consider splitting.
Passive voice used in 2 of 6 sentences.
